name: Tier 2 export ICS button downloads calendar file
description: Logged-in user clicks the Export .ics button in the dashboard header and receives a calendar download

planSteps.description: Type a unique email using tier2-export- plus random digits then @timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraE2E123! into the password field
If login fails because account does not exist, navigate to the register page, create the same account, then return to login and sign in
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard to load
Click the Export .ics button in the dashboard header
Wait for 3 seconds for the download to start
Verify a calendar file download was triggered or the browser received an ICS calendar response containing VCALENDAR content
